title: Ophrys sphegodes lusus pallescens
taxonomy: Ophrys sphegodes lusus pallescens is a variant of the bee orchid species Ophrys sphegodes. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The Orchidaceae family is a group of flowering plants within the monocot order Asparagales. Ophrys sphegodes lusus pallescens, like other bee orchids, is native to the Mediterranean region. Taxonomically, it is classified as a subspecies within the species Ophrys sphegodes.
